text.value: Did have the positive attitude towards client throughout the session? (calmness, eye contact, language, and smile, not interrupt activities of clients)
Please observe and note down if was able to interact well with the client during the visit.
Was kind towards the client and smiling?
Was looking at the client and paying attention througout the visit?
Was interrupting activities of the client?
Did communicate effectively with clients? (congratulates when a positive results after physical examination, encourage discussion where appropriate)
Did answer concerns and questions from clients? (knows when to refer to heath facility or supervisor)
Did ask for consent from client?

As a supervisor, please be an example by taking all the precautionary measures against infectious diseases when you visit your CHVs. Please remember to use sanitizer and wear mask throughout the visit.
Was able to read the pregnant woman/child's clinic card correctly?
Did enter data correctly as provided by client?

Did validate responses to questions that can be verified by asking the mother, from the child's health card, or through visual inspection at the time of data collection? (e.g newborn fast breathing, place of birth)
If the needs any support from HPU, CHMT or D-tree, then please share their phone numbers and ask the CHV to call them immediately after the visit.
Document the support provided to the based on your observation.
Does CHV ask the caregiver about problems they may face in carrying out play and communication activities?
Does CHV ask and observe how a caregiver comforts a child?
Does CHV ask and observe how a caregiver corrects a child? (If child age is above 6 months)
Does CHV ask and observe how the caregiver plays and talks with the child or gets the child to smile?
Does CHV ask and observe questions about a child's development stage?
Does CHV ask if the caregiver has any concerns about how the child is learning?
Does CHV discuss with caregivers how they might try to solve problems in carrying out these recommendations?
Does CHV encourage the caregiver to continue play activities at home daily?
Advises on Play and Communication activities
Does CHV ask caregivers to practice interactive play or communication activity with children?
Does CHV praise or advise for concerns in caregiver child interactions?
Does CHV praise caregivers for interactive play or communication at least once?
Does CHV suggest appropriate communication activity from the guide?
Does CHV suggest appropriate play activity from the guide?
Does CHV use appropriate toys to demonstrate to the caregiver?
Did provide visit summary, appreciation to client and promise to come next visit?
Do you want to make a follow up with ?
Date cannot be a past date or today
When would you like to follow up with ?
A quality monitoring follow up task for will appear on *__*.
Did introduce themselves and visitor(s), the program, their role and working tools?
stayed one meter from the client.
did not touch the client when doing physical examinations without sanitizing/washing hands before and after.
What are areas for improvement identified during this visit?

Before filling out this section of the form, please ensure that you sit down with the and discuss areas where did not perform well during the visit. After that outline a plan of resolving the challenges encountered and kindly give feedback where appropriate.
What progress made since 's last visit?
Did you receive any support from HPU, CHMT, or D-tree in resolving 's challenges?
Did explain the purpose of the topic/session?
How many times did visit you in the past year?
Ask the to step out before asking the following questions to the client.
When visited, what were the questions about?
Did assess all questions related to danger signs?
Did encourage the client to visit the facility/take the child to the facility after identification of danger sign?
Did navigate in the application, follow instructions, submit forms and sync data?
Did use job aids effectively? (bango kitita, play and communication actively guide)
Did do a recap of the previous visit?
Je, ana mtazamo chanya juu ya hali ya mteja? (yaani hamkatishi tamaa, hamuogopeshi au kumtishia mteja wakati wa tembeleo)
Tafadhali chunguza na onyesha jinsi alivoweza kuchangamana na mteja wakati wa tembeleo.
Je, alikuwa na lugha au tabasamu nzuri kwa mteja?
Je, alimuangalia mteja na kusikiliza kwa makini muda wote wa tembeleo?
Je, alikuwa mtulivu wakati wote wa tembeleo?
Je, alikuwa anakatisha kazi za mteja?
Je, anayo mawasiliano mazuri na wateja? (anampongeza mteja anapopata matokeo chanya baada ya uchunguzi, anahimiza majadiliano yanapohitajika)
Je ameweza kutatua na kujibu maswali ya mteja? (anajua ni wakati gani wa kumpa mteja rufaa kwenda kituo cha afya au kwa msimamizi)
Je, ameomba idhini kutoka kwa mteja?

Kama msimamizi wa wahudumu wa afya ya jamii, tafadhali kuwa mfano kwao kwa kuchukua tahadhari zote juu ya magonjwa ya kuambukiza pindi ukitembelea wahudumu wako. Kumbuka kutumia kitakasa mikono na kuvaa barakoa muda wote wa tembeleo.
Hatua za Kuchukua Pindi Unapoenda Kumtembelea Mteja Wako
Je, amepima kwa usahihi kipimo cha MUAC?
Je, ameweza kusoma kadi ya kliniki ya mama mjamzito/mtoto kwa usahihi?
Je, ameingiza taarifa za mteja kwa usahihi?

Je, ameweza kutumia kadi ya mtoto au vithibitisho vingine ili kuthibitisha majibu yaliyotolewa na mama? (majibu kama kupumua kwa haraka kwa mtoto mchanga, mahali alipo zaliwa nk yanahitaji CHV kuthibitisha kwa kuangalia kadi, kuchunguza kwa macho nk.)
Ikiwa atahitaji msaada wowote kutoka kwa HPU, CHMT au D-tree, tafadhali toa namba zao za simu na kumpa na muhimizie kuwapigia simu punde tu atakapomaliza kufanya tembeleo hili.
Andika usaidizi aliyoupata kwa mujibu wa mtazamo wako.
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anamuuliza mlezi kuhusu matatizo anayoyapata akiwa katika shughuli za michezo na mawasiliano?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anauliza na kuchunguza jinsi mlezi anavyo mfariji mtoto?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anauliza na kuchunguza jinsi mlezi anavyomkosoa mtoto?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anauliza na kuchunguza jinsi mlezi anacheza na kuzungumza na mtoto au namna anavyomfanya mtoto atabasamu?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anauliza na kuchunguza kuhusu hatua ya maendeleo kwa mtoto?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anamuuliza mlezi kama ana wasiwasi juu ya kujifunza kwa mtoto?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitoloea ana jadili na mlezi jinsi ya kutatua matatizo ili kuweza kutekeleza yaliyopendekezwa?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anamuhimiza mlezi kuendelea kucheza na mtoto nyumbani kwa kila siku?
Ushauri kuhusu shughuli za kucheza na mawasiliano na mtoto
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anamuuliza mlezi juu ya uchezaji wa mtoto na yeye au mwasiliano baina ya yeye na mtoto?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anapongeza na kumpa ushauri juu ya mahusiano ya mlezi na mtoto?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anampongeza angalau mara moja mlezi kwa kucheza na kuwa na mawasiliano na mtoto?
Utatuzi wa matatizo na changamoto za nyumbani
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea anapendekeza kuhusu mawasiliano kwa kulingana na muongozo?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea ana pendekezo michezo sahihi inayotoka katika muongozo?
Je muhudumu wa afya wa kujitolea ana tumia vifaa sahihi vya michezo katika kumuonyesha mlezi?
Maswali Kuboresha Huduma za Makuzi na Malezi Awali ya Mtoto
Je, ametoa muhtasri wa tembeleo, shukrani kwa mteja na kuahidi kurudi kwenye tembeleo linalofuata?
Je, amejitambulisha mwenyewe pamoja na majukumu yake, wageni walioko pamoja naye, ametambulisha mpango wa jamii ni afya na vifaa vya kutendea kazi?
amekaa umbali wa mita moja kutoka kwa mteja.
ametumia kitakasa mikono/kunawa mikoni kabla na baada ya kumfanyia mteja uchunguzi.
Je, amechukua hatua za tahadhari za kujikinga na maambukizi ya ugonjwa?
Ni maeneo gani uliyoyatambua wakati wa tembeleo yanayo hitaji maboresho zaidi?

Kabla ya kujaza sehemu zifuatazo, hakikisha unakaa chini na na kujadili maeneo yote ambayo hajafanya vizuri wakati wa tembeleo lako. Baada ya hapo weka mpango mkakati wa kutatua changamoto zilizojitokeza na ahidi kurudisha mrejesho pale ikibidi.
Ni maenedeleo gani yaliyofanywa na ukilinganisha na tembeleo lililopita?
Je, CHMT, HPU au D-tree wamekuwa msaada katika kutatua changamoto za ?
Muombe atoke nje kidogo kabla ya kumuuliza mteja masuali yafuatayo.
Je, alikuuliza masuali gani wakati alipokutembelea?
Je, ametathmini maswali yote yanayo husu dalili za hatari?
Je, amemuhimiza mteja kutembelea kituo cha afya/kumpeleka mtoto kituo cha afya baada ya kugundua daliliza za hatari?
Je, anatumia simu na kufuata maelekezo ya kwenye simu, amewasilisha fomu na kusawazisha taarifa?
Je, anatumia visaidizi vya kazi sawa sawa? (bango kitita, michezo na miongozo ya mawasiliano)
Je, amerudia kukumbusha kuhusu tembeleo lililopita?

bind.calculate:
if((selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ipc/n_precaution_question , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ipc/does_chv_stay_one_meter , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/introduction/does_chv_introduce_themselves , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/consenting/does_chv_ask_for_consent , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/visit_recap/does_chv_do_visit_recap , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/purpose_of_visit/does_chv_explain_visit_purpose , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/chv_attitude/does_chv_show_positive_attitude , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/chv_attitude/was_chv_calm , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/chv_attitude/was_chv_attentive , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/chv_attitude/was_chv_approachable , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/chv_attitude/was_chv_interruptive , 'yes')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/use_of_app/can_chv_navigate_app , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/communication/can_chv_refer_clients , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/communication/can_chv_encourage_discussion , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/data_validity/does_chv_validate_responses , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/data_validity/does_chv_enter_data_correctly , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/data_validity/can_chv_measure_muac_correctly , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/data_validity/can_chv_measure_read_clinic_card , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/referrals/does_chv_encourage_client_facility , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/referrals/does_chv_assess_all_questions , 'no')
or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/asks_child_learning , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/asks_child_development , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/asks_caregiver_play_and_talk , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/asks_caregiver_comfort_child , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/asks_caregiver_corrects_child , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/praise_caregiver_child_interaction , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/suggests_play_and_activity , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/suggests_communication_activity , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/use_appropriate_toy , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/practice_play_with_children , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/praise_caregiver_for_interactive_play , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/encourage_continue_play_at_home , 'no'), or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/ask_problems_play_communication , 'no') or selected( /chv_quality_monitoring/ecd_qi_questions/discuss_solve_problems , 'no')),'yes', 'no')
